slices.title: Operational prototype foundation
slices.summary: Static docs, wireframes, export templates, and prototype HTML surfaces.

slices.title: Interactive QA session app shell
slices.summary: Interactive static SPA with QA session workflow, persistence, notes, and evidence preview.

slices.title: Browser bridge and localhost helper mock
slices.summary: Capture ingress through browser events plus localhost health and session-bind mock server.

slices.title: Audit creation UI and file-backed run creation
slices.summary: Turn intake from a read-only surface into a creator that can start a new audit run from seeded defaults and write a local run file.

slices.title: Mock helper capture push endpoint
slices.summary: Add helper-side capture push endpoint and app-side pull/push test flow so simulated captures move over localhost without manual buttons.

slices.title: Export live app state to audit pack
slices.summary: Use the real app state shape as input for spreadsheet and memo export instead of only the separate workspace demo JSON.

slices.title: File-backed project store
slices.summary: Separate demo seed from operator-created local audit files and create a stable directory for saved audits.

slices.title: Dedicated note board and note filters
slices.summary: Break notes out from screen-only view into a first-class surface with type, status, and promotion filters.

slices.title: Saved run manifest and app-side audit switcher
slices.summary: Generate a browser-loadable saved run manifest and add an in-app audit switcher so operators can move between saved runs without manual file hunting.

slices.title: Evidence bundle manifest and package versioning
slices.summary: Extend exports with evidence bundle manifest, package version history, and deterministic delivery naming.

slices.title: Helper event log and receipt board
slices.summary: Add helper delivery receipts, event history, and a compact receipt board inside the app so operators can trust ingestion state.

slices.title: Local autonomous executor scaffold
slices.summary: Build a local executor scaffold that can read NEXT_SLICE, run deterministic project commands, and record execution receipts without needing manual direction each time.

slices.title: Keyboard-first QA actions
slices.summary: Add keyboard shortcuts for capture triage, issue creation, and screen navigation so operators can stay in flow.

slices.title: One-shot autonomy cycle runner
slices.summary: Add a single-command local autonomy cycle runner that claims work when needed, runs deterministic executor steps, and writes a cycle receipt.

slices.title: Command palette and audit jump
slices.summary: Add a compact command palette for opening views, switching audits, and triggering common QA actions from one place.

slices.title: Background watch launcher and Windows task scaffold
slices.summary: Add a background watch launcher and a Windows scheduled-task registration scaffold so the autonomy cycle can continue without chat input.

slices.title: Autonomy control center
slices.summary: Expose heartbeat, current slice, last cycle receipt, and last agent message inside the app so unattended execution is visible without opening files.

slices.title: Reference compare annotations and mismatch tagging
slices.summary: Add inline annotation markers to the compare workspace so operators can tag mismatches directly on reference/live panes before promoting them to issues or change requests.

slices.title: Annotation editing and geometry note filters
slices.summary: Add edit/remove actions for compare annotations and filter the note board by geometric note presence so compare mismatches become manageable at scale.

slices.title: Annotation detail drawer and quick promote
slices.summary: Add annotation detail drawer with edit metadata, evidence links, and one-click promote to bug or change request.

slices.title: Helper duplicate detection and stale queue cleanup
slices.summary: Detect duplicate helper captures, mark stale queue items, and surface cleanup actions before inbox pollution grows.

slices.title: Package diff report and rerun comparison
slices.summary: Generate a package-to-package diff summary so reruns can show what changed between audit outputs.

slices.title: Run snapshot archive and restore flow
slices.summary: Archive run snapshots with restore metadata so operators can roll back to a prior audit state or compare branches of QA work.

slices.title: Mismatch cluster board and batch actions
slices.summary: Group related annotations and issues into mismatch clusters so operators can batch triage and reduce repeated handoff work.

slices.title: Helper inbox aging and retry policy
slices.summary: Track helper inbox age, retry stale deliveries, and surface aging queues before evidence ingestion silently degrades.

slices.title: Delivery audit trail and client summary bundle
slices.summary: Create a client-facing delivery trail with package history, summary deltas, and a compact audit narrative for handoff confidence.

slices.title: Run lineage graph and branch merge notes
slices.summary: Model lineage between saved runs so operators can see rerun ancestry, branch notes, and merge candidates across QA work.

slices.title: Flow mode and distraction-free execution
slices.summary: Add a focused flow mode that hides secondary chrome so operators can move through scenarios with less context switching.

slices.title: Mismatch cluster board and batch actions
slices.summary: Group related annotations and issues into mismatch clusters so operators can batch triage and reduce repeated handoff work.

slices.summary: Track helper inbox age, retry stale deliveries, and surface aging queues before evidence ingestion silently degrades.
